# HelpChatbot вАФ Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that answers customer questions by retrieving relevant content from internal product PDF documentation using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), with Postgres (pgvector) as the vector/data store.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| Framework | .NET 10, Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Already targeted; real-time chat via SignalR |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; simple promptвЖТresponse with injected context (no agentic loops needed) |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (works with OpenAI & compatible APIs) | Wires into MEAI via `AddChatClient` |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via same provider | Reuses the MEAI abstraction |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` + `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` + pgvector | Postgres requirement; pgvector gives similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `UglyToad.PdfPig` | OSS, pure .NET, no native deps |
| Chat history / data | EF Core + Postgres | Already required; stores conversations |
| UI | Blazor Server interactive components | Low-latency streaming to browser |

## Architecture

```
вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР    SignalR     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
вФВ  Blazor UI   вФВвЧДвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвЦЇвФВ  ChatService     вФВ
вФВ  (Chat page) вФВ                вФВ  (IChatClient)   вФВ
вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ                вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФђвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
                                         вФВ
                            вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФЉвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                            вЦЉ            вЦЉ            вЦЉ
                     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                     вФВ VectorSearchвФВ вФВ EF Core  вФВ вФВ  OpenAI  вФВ
                     вФВ (pgvector) вФВ вФВ (history)вФВ вФВ  (LLM)   вФВ
                     вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
```

**RAG flow:**
1. On startup (or admin trigger), PDFs in `Docs/` are parsed вЖТ chunked вЖТ embedded вЖТ stored in pgvector.
2. User asks a question вЖТ question is embedded вЖТ top-K similar chunks retrieved вЖТ injected as context into LLM prompt вЖТ answer streamed back.

## Todos

### 1. Add NuGet packages
- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI` (LLM + embeddings)
- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, `pgvector` extension support
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` (vector search)
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` (PDF parsing)
- Blazor interactive server-side rendering packages (built-in)

### 2. Configure services (`Program.cs`)
- Register `IChatClient` and `IEmbeddingGenerator` via `AddChatClient`/`AddEmbeddingGenerator`
- Register EF Core `DbContext` with Npgsql + pgvector
- Register vector store for document chunks
- Add configuration for API keys (`IOptions<T>`, user-secrets)
- Add Blazor interactive server services

### 3. Data model & EF Core (`Data/`)
- `ChatSession` вАФ id, created date
- `ChatMessage` вАФ id, session id, role, content, timestamp
- `DocumentChunk` вАФ id, source file, chunk text, embedding vector
- `AppDbContext` with pgvector column mapping
- EF migration for initial schema

### 4. PDF ingestion service (`Services/DocumentIngestionService.cs`)
- Scan `Docs/` folder for PDFs
- Parse with PdfPig, extract text per page
- Chunk text semantically (split on paragraphs, ~500 token chunks with overlap)
- Generate embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`
- Upsert into `DocumentChunk` table (skip if already embedded)

### 5. RAG retrieval service (`Services/RetrievalService.cs`)
- Accept user query вЖТ embed it
- Perform pgvector cosine similarity search (top 5, min score 0.75)
- Return ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service (`Services/ChatService.cs`)
- Accept user message + session id
- Call `RetrievalService` to get relevant chunks
- Build system prompt with context injection + source references
- Call `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)
- Persist messages to `ChatMessage` table

### 7. Blazor UI (`Components/`)
- `MainLayout.razor` вАФ app shell
- `Pages/Chat.razor` вАФ chat page with message list + input
- `ChatMessageBubble.razor` вАФ styled message component
- Streaming token display via `StreamRendering`
- Session management (new chat / continue)

### 8. Configuration & startup
- `appsettings.json` вАФ connection string (no secrets), model IDs
- User-secrets or env vars for API key
- Hosted service to run document ingestion on startup
- Health check for Postgres + OpenAI

### 9. Testing & validation
- `dotnet build` clean
- Verify EF migration applies
- Manual smoke test of ingestion + chat flow

## Guardrails Applied
- Temperature = 0 for factual RAG answers
- MaxOutputTokens capped
- Relevance threshold on vector search (0.75)
- Source attribution in responses
- API key via user-secrets (not in committed config)
- Streaming for low time-to-first-token
- Embeddings cached in DB (no re-embedding)

- `UglyToad.PdfPig` (PDF parsing)
- Blazor interactive server-side rendering packages (built-in)

- Register `IChatClient` and `IEmbeddingGenerator` via `AddChatClient`/`AddEmbeddingGenerator`
- Register EF Core `DbContext` with Npgsql + pgvector
- Register vector store for document chunks
- Add configuration for API keys (`IOptions<T>`, user-secrets)

- Accept user query вЖТ embed it

- Return ranked chunks with source attribution

- Call `RetrievalService` to get relevant chunks
- Build system prompt with context injection + source references
- Call `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)
- Persist messages to `ChatMessage` table

- `ChatMessageBubble.razor` вАФ styled message component
- Streaming token display via `StreamRendering`
- Session management (new chat / continue)

### 8. Configuration & startup
- `appsettings.json` вАФ connection string (no secrets), model IDs
- User-secrets or env vars for API key
- Hosted service to run document ingestion on startup
- Health check for Postgres + OpenAI

### 9. Testing & validation
- `dotnet build` clean
- Verify EF migration applies
- Manual smoke test of ingestion + chat flow

## Guardrails Applied
- Temperature = 0 for factual RAG answers
- MaxOutputTokens capped
- Relevance threshold on vector search (0.75)
- Source attribution in responses
- API key via user-secrets (not in committed config)
- Streaming for low time-to-first-token
- Embeddings cached in DB (no re-embedding)

# HelpChatbot вАФ Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that answers customer questions by retrieving relevant content from internal product PDF documentation using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), with Postgres (pgvector) as the vector/data store.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| Framework | .NET 10, Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Already targeted; real-time chat via SignalR |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; simple promptвЖТresponse with injected context (no agentic loops needed) |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (works with OpenAI & compatible APIs) | Wires into MEAI via `AddChatClient` |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via same provider | Reuses the MEAI abstraction |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` + `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` + pgvector | Postgres requirement; pgvector gives similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `UglyToad.PdfPig` | OSS, pure .NET, no native deps |
| Chat history / data | EF Core + Postgres | Already required; stores conversations |
| UI | Blazor Server interactive components | Low-latency streaming to browser |

## Architecture

```
вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР    SignalR     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
вФВ  Blazor UI   вФВвЧДвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвЦЇвФВ  ChatService     вФВ
вФВ  (Chat page) вФВ                вФВ  (IChatClient)   вФВ
вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ                вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФђвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
                                         вФВ
                            вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФЉвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                            вЦЉ            вЦЉ            вЦЉ
                     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                     вФВ VectorSearchвФВ вФВ EF Core  вФВ вФВ  OpenAI  вФВ
                     вФВ (pgvector) вФВ вФВ (history)вФВ вФВ  (LLM)   вФВ
                     вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
```

**RAG flow:**
1. On startup (or admin trigger), PDFs in `Docs/` are parsed вЖТ chunked вЖТ embedded вЖТ stored in pgvector.
2. User asks a question вЖТ question is embedded вЖТ top-K similar chunks retrieved вЖТ injected as context into LLM prompt вЖТ answer streamed back.

## Todos

### 1. Add NuGet packages
- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI` (LLM + embeddings)
- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, pgvector extension support
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` (vector search)
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` (PDF parsing)
- Blazor interactive server-side rendering packages (built-in)

### 2. Configure services (`Program.cs`)
- Register `IChatClient` and `IEmbeddingGenerator` via `AddChatClient`/`AddEmbeddingGenerator`
- Register EF Core `DbContext` with Npgsql + pgvector
- Register vector store for document chunks
- Add configuration for API keys (`IOptions<T>`, user-secrets)
- Add Blazor interactive server services

### 3. Data model & EF Core (`Data/`)
- `ChatSession` вАФ id, created date
- `ChatMessage` вАФ id, session id, role, content, timestamp
- `DocumentChunk` вАФ id, source file, chunk text, embedding vector
- `AppDbContext` with pgvector column mapping
- EF migration for initial schema

### 4. PDF ingestion service (`Services/DocumentIngestionService.cs`)
- Scan `Docs/` folder for PDFs
- Parse with PdfPig, extract text per page
- Chunk text semantically (split on paragraphs, ~500 token chunks with overlap)
- Generate embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`
- Upsert into `DocumentChunk` table (skip if already embedded)

### 5. RAG retrieval service (`Services/RetrievalService.cs`)
- Accept user query вЖТ embed it
- Perform pgvector cosine similarity search (top 5, min score 0.75)
- Return ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service (`Services/ChatService.cs`)
- Accept user message + session id
- Call `RetrievalService` to get relevant chunks
- Build system prompt with context injection + source references
- Call `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)
- Persist messages to `ChatMessage` table

### 7. Blazor UI (`Components/`)
- `MainLayout.razor` вАФ app shell
- `Pages/Chat.razor` вАФ chat page with message list + input
- `ChatMessageBubble.razor` вАФ styled message component
- Streaming token display via `StreamRendering`
- Session management (new chat / continue)

### 8. Configuration & startup
- `appsettings.json` вАФ connection string (no secrets), model IDs
- User-secrets or env vars for API key
- Hosted service to run document ingestion on startup
- Health check for Postgres + OpenAI

### 9. Testing & validation
- `dotnet build` clean
- Verify EF migration applies
- Manual smoke test of ingestion + chat flow

## Guardrails Applied
- Temperature = 0 for factual RAG answers
- MaxOutputTokens capped
- Relevance threshold on vector search (0.75)
- Source attribution in responses
- API key via user-secrets (not in committed config)
- Streaming for low time-to-first-token
- Embeddings cached in DB (no re-embedding)

# HelpChatbot вАФ Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that answers customer questions by retrieving relevant content from internal product PDF documentation using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), with Postgres (pgvector) as the vector/data store.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| Framework | .NET 10, Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Already targeted; real-time chat via SignalR |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; simple promptвЖТresponse with injected context (no agentic loops needed) |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (works with OpenAI & compatible APIs) | Wires into MEAI via `AddChatClient` |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via same provider | Reuses the MEAI abstraction |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` + `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` + pgvector | Postgres requirement; pgvector gives similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `UglyToad.PdfPig` | OSS, pure .NET, no native deps |
| Chat history / data | EF Core + Postgres | Already required; stores conversations |
| UI | Blazor Server interactive components | Low-latency streaming to browser |

## Architecture

```

                                         вФВ
                            вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФЉвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                            вЦЉ            вЦЉ            вЦЉ

                     вФВ (pgvector) вФВ вФВ (history)вФВ вФВ  (LLM)   вФВ
                     вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ

- Add Blazor interactive server services

- Perform pgvector cosine similarity search (top 5, min score 0.75)
- Return ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service (`Services/ChatService.cs`)
- Accept user message + session id
- Call `RetrievalService` to get relevant chunks
- Build system prompt with context injection + source references
- Call `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)
- Persist messages to `ChatMessage` table

### 7. Blazor UI (`Components/`)
- `MainLayout.razor` вАФ app shell
- `Pages/Chat.razor` вАФ chat page with message list + input
- `ChatMessageBubble.razor` вАФ styled message component
- Streaming token display via `StreamRendering`
- Session management (new chat / continue)

### 8. Configuration & startup
- `appsettings.json` вАФ connection string (no secrets), model IDs
- User-secrets or env vars for API key
- Hosted service to run document ingestion on startup
- Health check for Postgres + OpenAI

### 9. Testing & validation
- `dotnet build` clean
- Verify EF migration applies
- Manual smoke test of ingestion + chat flow

## Guardrails Applied
- Temperature = 0 for factual RAG answers
- MaxOutputTokens capped
- Relevance threshold on vector search (0.75)
- Source attribution in responses
- API key via user-secrets (not in committed config)
- Streaming for low time-to-first-token
- Embeddings cached in DB (no re-embedding)

# HelpChatbot вАФ Implementation Plan

## Problem
Build a Blazor web chatbot that answers customer questions by retrieving relevant content from internal product PDF documentation using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), with Postgres (pgvector) as the vector/data store.

## Technology Choices (per .NET AI guidance)

| Concern | Choice | Rationale |
|---------|--------|-----------|
| Framework | .NET 10, Blazor Server (Interactive SSR) | Already targeted; real-time chat via SignalR |
| LLM abstraction | `Microsoft.Extensions.AI` (`IChatClient`) | Provider-agnostic; simple promptвЖТresponse with injected context (no agentic loops needed) |
| LLM provider | `OpenAI` NuGet (works with OpenAI & compatible APIs) | Wires into MEAI via `AddChatClient` |
| Embeddings | `IEmbeddingGenerator<string, Embedding<float>>` via same provider | Reuses the MEAI abstraction |
| Vector store | `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` + `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL` + pgvector | Postgres requirement; pgvector gives similarity search |
| PDF parsing | `UglyToad.PdfPig` | OSS, pure .NET, no native deps |
| Chat history / data | EF Core + Postgres | Already required; stores conversations |
| UI | Blazor Server interactive components | Low-latency streaming to browser |

## Architecture

```
вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР    SignalR     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
вФВ  Blazor UI   вФВвЧДвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвЦЇвФВ  ChatService     вФВ
вФВ  (Chat page) вФВ                вФВ  (IChatClient)   вФВ
вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ                вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФђвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
                                         вФВ
                            вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФЉвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                            вЦЉ            вЦЉ            вЦЉ
                     вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР вФМвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФР
                     вФВ VectorSearchвФВ вФВ EF Core  вФВ вФВ  OpenAI  вФВ
                     вФВ (pgvector) вФВ вФВ (history)вФВ вФВ  (LLM)   вФВ
                     вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ вФФвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФШ
```

**RAG flow:**
1. On startup (or admin trigger), PDFs in `Docs/` are parsed вЖТ chunked вЖТ embedded вЖТ stored in pgvector.
2. User asks a question вЖТ question is embedded вЖТ top-K similar chunks retrieved вЖТ injected as context into LLM prompt вЖТ answer streamed back.

## Todos

### 1. Add NuGet packages
- `Microsoft.Extensions.AI`, `OpenAI` (LLM + embeddings)
- `Npgsql.EntityFrameworkCore.PostgreSQL`, pgvector extension support
- `Microsoft.Extensions.VectorData.Abstractions` (vector search)
- `UglyToad.PdfPig` (PDF parsing)
- Blazor interactive server-side rendering packages (built-in)

### 2. Configure services (`Program.cs`)
- Register `IChatClient` and `IEmbeddingGenerator` via `AddChatClient`/`AddEmbeddingGenerator`
- Register EF Core `DbContext` with Npgsql + pgvector
- Register vector store for document chunks
- Add configuration for API keys (`IOptions<T>`, user-secrets)
- Add Blazor interactive server services

### 3. Data model & EF Core (`Data/`)
- `ChatSession` вАФ id, created date
- `ChatMessage` вАФ id, session id, role, content, timestamp
- `DocumentChunk` вАФ id, source file, chunk text, embedding vector
- `AppDbContext` with pgvector column mapping
- EF migration for initial schema

### 4. PDF ingestion service (`Services/DocumentIngestionService.cs`)
- Scan `Docs/` folder for PDFs
- Parse with PdfPig, extract text per page
- Chunk text semantically (split on paragraphs, ~500 token chunks with overlap)
- Generate embeddings via `IEmbeddingGenerator`
- Upsert into `DocumentChunk` table (skip if already embedded)

### 5. RAG retrieval service (`Services/RetrievalService.cs`)
- Accept user query вЖТ embed it
- Perform pgvector cosine similarity search (top 5, min score 0.75)
- Return ranked chunks with source attribution

### 6. Chat service (`Services/ChatService.cs`)
- Accept user message + session id
- Call `RetrievalService` to get relevant chunks
- Build system prompt with context injection + source references
- Call `IChatClient` with streaming (`GetStreamingResponseAsync`)
- Persist messages to `ChatMessage` table

### 7. Blazor UI (`Components/`)
- `MainLayout.razor` вАФ app shell
- `Pages/Chat.razor` вАФ chat page with message list + input
- `ChatMessageBubble.razor` вАФ styled message component
- Streaming token display via `StreamRendering`
- Session management (new chat / continue)

### 8. Configuration & startup
- `appsettings.json` вАФ connection string (no secrets), model IDs
- User-secrets or env vars for API key
- Hosted service to run document ingestion on startup
- Health check for Postgres + OpenAI

### 9. Testing & validation
- `dotnet build` clean
- Verify EF migration applies
- Manual smoke test of ingestion + chat flow

## Guardrails Applied
- Temperature = 0 for factual RAG answers
- MaxOutputTokens capped
- Relevance threshold on vector search (0.75)
- Source attribution in responses
- API key via user-secrets (not in committed config)
- Streaming for low time-to-first-token
- Embeddings cached in DB (no re-embedding)
